header.note: The source node in most cases contains the sample message as written by the developer. If it looks like a dot-delimitted string such as "form.label.firstname", then the developer has not provided a default message.

trans-unit.resname: Setting '%setting%' has invalid value. Allowed values are: %allowedValues%.
trans-unit.source: Setting '%setting%' has invalid value. Allowed values are: %allowedValues%.
trans-unit.note: key: Setting '%setting%' has invalid value. Allowed values are: %allowedValues%.

trans-unit.resname: You can only select Entries belonging to the same taxonomy.
trans-unit.source: You can only select Entries belonging to the same taxonomy.
trans-unit.note: key: You can only select Entries belonging to the same taxonomy.

trans-unit.resname: limitationValues[%key%] => '%value%' does not exist in the backend
trans-unit.source: limitationValues[%key%] => '%value%' does not exist in the backend
trans-unit.note: key: limitationValues[%key%] => '%value%' does not exist in the backend
